title: interview.round.started payload (v1)
description: Emitted when interview-service starts a Technical/HR/Final round (creates a stub interview for the next round). Producer: interview-service (apps/interview-service/src/lib/round-progression.ts). Note the subject uses domain=interview, event=round.started, so the leaf is `round.started` (subject tenant.{tenantId}.interview.round.started). Carries the canonical targetStage the pipeline should reflect so candidate-service can forward-only advance the Application.stage.
x-consumers: candidate-service (forward-only advance Application.stage to targetStage TECHNICAL_ROUND / HR_ROUND / FINAL_REVIEW)

applicationId.description: Application to advance. The producer sends the id it has; consumer no-ops when absent (ad-hoc interviews).

interviewId.description: The stub interview created for this round.

interviewType.description: Round interview type (e.g. TECHNICAL, BEHAVIORAL, PANEL, FINAL).

targetStage.description: Canonical Application.stage this round maps to (TECHNICAL_ROUND / HR_ROUND / FINAL_REVIEW).
